headline: Newell Brands' 2026 Outlook: Stabilization or More Pain Ahead?
summary: NWL heads into 2026, forecasting stabilization, modest margin gains and tariff headwinds as sales stay soft and brand investment ramps up.

headline: B&G Foods Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Sales Decrease 2.2% Y/Y
summary: BGS' fourth-quarter EPS met estimates as sales slipped 2.2% on divestitures, while margins expanded and sees 2026 EPS of 55 cents to 65 cents.

raw.headline: B&G Foods Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Sales Decrease 2.2% Y/Y
raw.summary: BGS' fourth-quarter EPS met estimates as sales slipped 2.2% on divestitures, while margins expanded and sees 2026 EPS of 55 cents to 65 cents.

headline: Hershey's Salty Snacks Sales Surge: Is the 28% Growth Durable?
summary: HSY's North America Salty Snacks sales rose 28% to $357M in Q4, driven by LesserEvil and strong retail demand.
